basicOptions.displayName: 计费项费用趋势(资源包抵扣后)

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: *  | select date_trunc('day', __time__)  as "日期", billingItem, round(sum(PretaxAmount),3) as "费用" from instance_bill where (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest')  and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '%%' and OwnerId like '%%'  group by "日期",billingItem order by "日期"   limit 1000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: *  | select date_trunc('day', __time__)  as "日期", billingItem, round(sum(PretaxAmount),3) as "费用" from instance_bill where (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest')  and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '${{Logstore|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '${{Project|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '${{Region|%%}}' and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}'  group by "日期",billingItem order by "日期"   limit 1000

basicOptions.displayName: 计费项用量趋势(资源包抵扣后)

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query:
* |
select
  date_trunc('day', __time__) as "日期",
  round(sum(Usage), 3) as "Usage",
  case
    when UsageUnit = '' then billingItem
    else concat(billingItem, ' (', UsageUnit, ')')
  end as billingItem
from instance_bill where (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest')  and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '%%'and OwnerId like '%%'
group by
  "日期",
  billingItem
order by
  "日期"
limit
  1000
chartQueries.tokenQuery:
* |
select
  date_trunc('day', __time__) as "日期",
  round(sum(Usage), 3) as "Usage",
  case
    when UsageUnit = '' then billingItem
    else concat(billingItem, ' (', UsageUnit, ')')
  end as billingItem
from instance_bill where (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest')  and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '${{Logstore|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '${{Project|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '${{Region|%%}}'and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}'
group by
  "日期",
  billingItem
order by
  "日期"
limit
  1000

A.name: A
xAxisKeys: 存储空间-日志低频存储（GB）
存储空间-日志归档存储（GB）

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query:
(*) | with
t1 as (
 select
    split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) as Region,
        split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) as Project,
        InstanceID,
        split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) as Logstore
from instance_bill
 where
            (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest') 
and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '%%'and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '%%'and OwnerId like '%%'
          group by
            InstanceID
),

t2 as (
  select
    InstanceID,
    round(di [1], 3) as "费用",
    concat(cast(round(di [3] * 100 -100, 3) as varchar), '%') "同比上月"
  from(
      select
        InstanceID,
        compare(cost, 2592000) as di
      FROM        (
          select
            InstanceID,
            round(sum(PretaxAmount), 2) as cost
          FROM            instance_bill
          where
            (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest') 
and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '%%'and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '%%'and OwnerId like '%%'
          group by
            InstanceID
        )
      group by
        InstanceID
    )
),
t3 as (
  select
    InstanceID,
    max_by("存储空间-日志热存储（GB）", t) as "存储空间-日志热存储（GB）",
max_by("存储空间-日志低频存储（GB）", t) as "存储空间-日志低频存储（GB）",
max_by("存储空间-日志归档存储（GB）", t) as "存储空间-日志归档存储（GB）",
max_by("存储空间-时序存储（GB）", t) as "存储空间-时序存储（GB）"
  FROM    (
      select
        t,
        InstanceID,
        round(sum("存储空间-日志热存储（GB）"), 2) as "存储空间-日志热存储（GB）",
round(sum("存储空间-日志低频存储（GB）"), 2) as "存储空间-日志低频存储（GB）",
round(sum("存储空间-日志归档存储（GB）"), 2) as "存储空间-日志归档存储（GB）",
round(sum("存储空间-时序存储（GB）"), 2) as "存储空间-时序存储（GB）"
      from(
          select
            date_trunc('day', __time__) as t,
            InstanceID,
          	case
              when (BillingItem ='存储空间' or BillingItem='存储空间-日志存储' or BillingItem ='Storage Usage of Log Data' or BillingItem ='Used Storage Space of Log Data') then Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage
              else 0
            end as "存储空间-日志热存储（GB）",
            case
              when (BillingItem = '存储空间-日志低频存储' or BillingItem = 'Storage Usage of IA Storage Tier') then Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage
              else 0
            end as "存储空间-日志低频存储（GB）",
            case
              when (BillingItem = '存储空间-日志归档存储' or BillingItem = 'Storage Usage of Archive Storage Tier') then Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage
              else 0
            end as "存储空间-日志归档存储（GB）",
            case
              when (BillingItem = '存储空间-时序存储' or BillingItem = 'Used Storage Space of Time Series Data') then Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage
              else 0
            end as "存储空间-时序存储（GB）"
          FROM            instance_bill
          WHERE
            (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest') 
and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '%%'and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '%%'and OwnerId like '%%'
          group by
            t,
            InstanceID,
            "存储空间-日志热存储（GB）",
"存储空间-日志低频存储（GB）",
"存储空间-日志归档存储（GB）",
"存储空间-时序存储（GB）"
        )
      group by
        t,
        InstanceID
      order by
        t asc
    )
  group by
    InstanceID
),
t4 as (
  select
    InstanceID,
	"资源包抵扣费用"
  from(
          select
    			InstanceID,
             round(sum(DeductedByResourcePackage * ListPrice), 2) as "资源包抵扣费用"
          FROM            instance_bill
          where (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest') and 
 split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '%%'and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '%%'and OwnerId like '%%'
          group by
    InstanceID
)
      group by
    InstanceID,
"资源包抵扣费用"
),t5 as (
  select
    Region,
    Project,
    Logstore,
    InstanceID,
    concat(BillingItem, ' (', Unit, ')') BillingItem,
    Usage
  from(
      select
        split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) as Region,
        split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) as Project,
        InstanceID,
        split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) as Logstore,
        BillingItem,
        arbitrary(UsageUnit) as Unit,
        sum(Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage) as Usage
      FROM        instance_bill
      where
        (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest') 
        and BillingItem not like '%存储空间%' and BillingItem not like '%Storage%'
and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '%%'and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '%%'and OwnerId like '%%'
      group by
        InstanceID,
        UsageUnit,
        BillingItem
    )
)
select
  t1.Region as Region,
  t1.Project as Project,
  t1.Logstore as Logstore,
  t5.BillingItem as BillingItem,
  t5.Usage as Usage,
  t2."费用" as "费用 (元)",
  t2."同比上月" as "同比上月 (%)",
t3."存储空间-日志热存储（GB）" as "存储空间-日志热存储（GB）",
t3."存储空间-日志低频存储（GB）" as "存储空间-日志低频存储（GB）",
t3."存储空间-日志归档存储（GB）" as "存储空间-日志归档存储（GB）",
t3."存储空间-时序存储（GB）" as "存储空间-时序存储（GB）",
  t4."资源包抵扣费用" as "资源包抵扣费用"
FROM  t1
  left join t2 on t1.InstanceID = t2.InstanceID
  left join t3 on t1.InstanceID = t3.InstanceID
  left join t4 on t1.InstanceID = t4.InstanceID
left join t5 on t1.InstanceID = t5.InstanceID
order by "费用 (元)" desc
limit
  150000
chartQueries.tokenQuery:
(*) | with
t1 as (
 select
    split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) as Region,
        split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) as Project,
        InstanceID,
        split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) as Logstore
from instance_bill
 where
            (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest') 
and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '${{Logstore|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '${{Project|%%}}'and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '${{Region|%%}}'and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}'
          group by
            InstanceID
),

t2 as (
  select
    InstanceID,
    round(di [1], 3) as "费用",
    concat(cast(round(di [3] * 100 -100, 3) as varchar), '%') "同比上月"
  from(
      select
        InstanceID,
        compare(cost, 2592000) as di
      FROM        (
          select
            InstanceID,
            round(sum(PretaxAmount), 2) as cost
          FROM            instance_bill
          where
            (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest') 
and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '${{Logstore|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '${{Project|%%}}'and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '${{Region|%%}}'and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}'
          group by
            InstanceID
        )
      group by
        InstanceID
    )
),
t3 as (
  select
    InstanceID,
    max_by("存储空间-日志热存储（GB）", t) as "存储空间-日志热存储（GB）",
max_by("存储空间-日志低频存储（GB）", t) as "存储空间-日志低频存储（GB）",
max_by("存储空间-日志归档存储（GB）", t) as "存储空间-日志归档存储（GB）",
max_by("存储空间-时序存储（GB）", t) as "存储空间-时序存储（GB）"
  FROM    (
      select
        t,
        InstanceID,
        round(sum("存储空间-日志热存储（GB）"), 2) as "存储空间-日志热存储（GB）",
round(sum("存储空间-日志低频存储（GB）"), 2) as "存储空间-日志低频存储（GB）",
round(sum("存储空间-日志归档存储（GB）"), 2) as "存储空间-日志归档存储（GB）",
round(sum("存储空间-时序存储（GB）"), 2) as "存储空间-时序存储（GB）"
      from(
          select
            date_trunc('day', __time__) as t,
            InstanceID,
          	case
              when (BillingItem ='存储空间' or BillingItem='存储空间-日志存储' or BillingItem ='Storage Usage of Log Data' or BillingItem ='Used Storage Space of Log Data') then Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage
              else 0
            end as "存储空间-日志热存储（GB）",
            case
              when (BillingItem = '存储空间-日志低频存储' or BillingItem = 'Storage Usage of IA Storage Tier') then Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage
              else 0
            end as "存储空间-日志低频存储（GB）",
            case
              when (BillingItem = '存储空间-日志归档存储' or BillingItem = 'Storage Usage of Archive Storage Tier') then Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage
              else 0
            end as "存储空间-日志归档存储（GB）",
            case
              when (BillingItem = '存储空间-时序存储' or BillingItem = 'Used Storage Space of Time Series Data') then Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage
              else 0
            end as "存储空间-时序存储（GB）"
          FROM            instance_bill
          WHERE
            (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest') 
and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '${{Logstore|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '${{Project|%%}}'and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '${{Region|%%}}'and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}'
          group by
            t,
            InstanceID,
            "存储空间-日志热存储（GB）",
"存储空间-日志低频存储（GB）",
"存储空间-日志归档存储（GB）",
"存储空间-时序存储（GB）"
        )
      group by
        t,
        InstanceID
      order by
        t asc
    )
  group by
    InstanceID
),
t4 as (
  select
    InstanceID,
	"资源包抵扣费用"
  from(
          select
    			InstanceID,
             round(sum(DeductedByResourcePackage * ListPrice), 2) as "资源包抵扣费用"
          FROM            instance_bill
          where (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest') and 
 split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '${{Logstore|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '${{Project|%%}}'and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '${{Region|%%}}'and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}'
          group by
    InstanceID
)
      group by
    InstanceID,
"资源包抵扣费用"
),t5 as (
  select
    Region,
    Project,
    Logstore,
    InstanceID,
    concat(BillingItem, ' (', Unit, ')') BillingItem,
    Usage
  from(
      select
        split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) as Region,
        split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) as Project,
        InstanceID,
        split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) as Logstore,
        BillingItem,
        arbitrary(UsageUnit) as Unit,
        sum(Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage) as Usage
      FROM        instance_bill
      where
        (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest') 
        and BillingItem not like '%存储空间%' and BillingItem not like '%Storage%'
and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '${{Logstore|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '${{Project|%%}}'and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '${{Region|%%}}'and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}'
      group by
        InstanceID,
        UsageUnit,
        BillingItem
    )
)
select
  t1.Region as Region,
  t1.Project as Project,
  t1.Logstore as Logstore,
  t5.BillingItem as BillingItem,
  t5.Usage as Usage,
  t2."费用" as "费用 (元)",
  t2."同比上月" as "同比上月 (%)",
t3."存储空间-日志热存储（GB）" as "存储空间-日志热存储（GB）",
t3."存储空间-日志低频存储（GB）" as "存储空间-日志低频存储（GB）",
t3."存储空间-日志归档存储（GB）" as "存储空间-日志归档存储（GB）",
t3."存储空间-时序存储（GB）" as "存储空间-时序存储（GB）",
  t4."资源包抵扣费用" as "资源包抵扣费用"
FROM  t1
  left join t2 on t1.InstanceID = t2.InstanceID
  left join t3 on t1.InstanceID = t3.InstanceID
  left join t4 on t1.InstanceID = t4.InstanceID
left join t5 on t1.InstanceID = t5.InstanceID
order by "费用 (元)" desc
limit
  150000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | select t, cost as "昨日费用", (cost-lag(cost, 1, 0) over())/lag(cost, 1, 0) over()*100 as "同比前一天费用" FROM  (select sum(PretaxAmount) as cost, date_format(__time__, '%Y-%m-%d') as t FROM instance_bill where (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest')  and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '%%'and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '%%'and OwnerId like '%%'  group by t order by t asc) limit 1000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | select t, cost as "昨日费用", (cost-lag(cost, 1, 0) over())/lag(cost, 1, 0) over()*100 as "同比前一天费用" FROM  (select sum(PretaxAmount) as cost, date_format(__time__, '%Y-%m-%d') as t FROM instance_bill where (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest')  and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '${{Logstore|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '${{Project|%%}}'and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '${{Region|%%}}'and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}'  group by t order by t asc) limit 1000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | select t, cost as "本月费用", (cost-lag(cost, 1, 0) over())/lag(cost, 1, 0) over()*100 as "同比前一月费用" FROM  (select sum(PretaxAmount) as cost, date_trunc('month', __time__)  as t FROM  instance_bill where (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest')  and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '%%'and OwnerId like '%%' group by t order by t asc) limit 1000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | select t, cost as "本月费用", (cost-lag(cost, 1, 0) over())/lag(cost, 1, 0) over()*100 as "同比前一月费用" FROM  (select sum(PretaxAmount) as cost, date_trunc('month', __time__)  as t FROM  instance_bill where (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest')  and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '${{Logstore|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '${{Project|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '${{Region|%%}}'and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}' group by t order by t asc) limit 1000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: *  |select  sum(Usage*1024*1024*1024+DeductedByResourcePackage*1024*1024*1024) as "存储空间" ,date_trunc('day',__time__) as t  from instance_bill where  (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest')  and (BillingItem like '%存储空间%' or BillingItem like '%Storage%') and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '%%' and OwnerId like '%%' group by t order by t asc limit 1000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: *  |select  sum(Usage*1024*1024*1024+DeductedByResourcePackage*1024*1024*1024) as "存储空间" ,date_trunc('day',__time__) as t  from instance_bill where  (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest')  and (BillingItem like '%存储空间%' or BillingItem like '%Storage%') and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '${{Logstore|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '${{Project|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '${{Region|%%}}' and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}' group by t order by t asc limit 1000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * |select  sum(Usage*1024*1024*1024+DeductedByResourcePackage*1024*1024*1024) as "数据加工流量" ,date_trunc('day',__time__) as t  from instance_bill where (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest')  and (BillingItem like '%数据加工%' or BillingItem like '%Data Transformation%') and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '%%' and OwnerId like '%%' group by t order by t asc limit 1000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * |select  sum(Usage*1024*1024*1024+DeductedByResourcePackage*1024*1024*1024) as "数据加工流量" ,date_trunc('day',__time__) as t  from instance_bill where (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest')  and (BillingItem like '%数据加工%' or BillingItem like '%Data Transformation%') and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '${{Logstore|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '${{Project|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '${{Region|%%}}' and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}' group by t order by t asc limit 1000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | select sum(Usage*1024*1024*1024+DeductedByResourcePackage*1024*1024*1024) as "索引流量" ,date_trunc('day',__time__) as t from instance_bill where  (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest')  and (BillingItem like '%索引流量%' or BillingItem like '%Index%') and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '%%' and OwnerId like '%%'  group by t order by t asc limit 1000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | select sum(Usage*1024*1024*1024+DeductedByResourcePackage*1024*1024*1024) as "索引流量" ,date_trunc('day',__time__) as t from instance_bill where  (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest')  and (BillingItem like '%索引流量%' or BillingItem like '%Index%') and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '${{Logstore|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '${{Project|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '${{Region|%%}}' and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}'  group by t order by t asc limit 1000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | select  sum(Usage*1024*1024*1024+DeductedByResourcePackage*1024*1024*1024) as "读写流量" ,date_trunc('day',__time__) as t  from instance_bill where (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest')  and (BillingItem like '%读写流量%' or BillingItem like '%Read Write Flow%' or BillingItem like '%Read/write Traffic%') and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '%%' and OwnerId like '%%'and OwnerId like '%%' group by t order by t asc limit 1000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | select  sum(Usage*1024*1024*1024+DeductedByResourcePackage*1024*1024*1024) as "读写流量" ,date_trunc('day',__time__) as t  from instance_bill where (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest')  and (BillingItem like '%读写流量%' or BillingItem like '%Read Write Flow%' or BillingItem like '%Read/write Traffic%') and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '${{Logstore|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '${{Project|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '${{Region|%%}}' and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}'and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}' group by t order by t asc limit 1000

A.name: A
xAxisKeys: 存储空间-日志低频存储（GB）
存储空间-日志归档存储（GB）

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query:
(
  *
) | with
t1 as (
	select 
	split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) as Region,
    split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) as Project
	from instance_bill 		  
where (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest') 
and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '%%'and OwnerId like '%%'
          group by
            Region,
            Project
), 
t2 as (
  select
    Region,
    Project,
    round(di [1], 3) as "费用",
    concat(
      cast(round(di [3] * 100 -100, 3) as varchar),
      '%'
    ) "同比上月"
  from(
      select
        Region,
        Project,
        compare(cost, 2592000) as di
      FROM        (
          select
            split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) as Region,
            split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) as Project,
            sum(PretaxAmount) as cost
          FROM            instance_bill
		  where (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest') 
and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '%%'and OwnerId like '%%'
          group by
            Region,
            Project
        )
      group by
        Region,
        Project
    )
),
t3 as (
  select
    Region,
    Project,
    max_by("存储空间-日志热存储（GB）", t) as "存储空间-日志热存储（GB）",
 max_by("存储空间-日志低频存储（GB）", t) as "存储空间-日志低频存储（GB）",
 max_by("存储空间-日志归档存储（GB）", t) as "存储空间-日志归档存储（GB）",
 max_by("存储空间-时序存储（GB）", t) as "存储空间-时序存储（GB）"
  FROM    (
      select
        t,
			split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) as Region,
            split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) as Project,
        round(sum("存储空间-日志热存储（GB）"), 2) as "存储空间-日志热存储（GB）",
        round(sum("存储空间-日志低频存储（GB）"), 2) as "存储空间-日志低频存储（GB）",
round(sum("存储空间-日志归档存储（GB）"), 2) as "存储空间-日志归档存储（GB）",
round(sum("存储空间-时序存储（GB）"), 2) as "存储空间-时序存储（GB）"
      from(
          select
            date_trunc('day', __time__) as t,
			InstanceID,
            case
              when (BillingItem ='存储空间' or BillingItem='存储空间-日志存储' or BillingItem ='Storage Usage of Log Data' or BillingItem ='Used Storage Space of Log Data') then Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage
              else 0
            end as "存储空间-日志热存储（GB）",
            case
              when (BillingItem = '存储空间-日志低频存储' or BillingItem = 'Storage Usage of IA Storage Tier') then Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage
              else 0
            end as "存储空间-日志低频存储（GB）",
            case
              when (BillingItem = '存储空间-日志归档存储' or BillingItem = 'Storage Usage of Archive Storage Tier') then Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage
              else 0
			end as "存储空间-日志归档存储（GB）",
            case
              when (BillingItem = '存储空间-时序存储' or BillingItem = 'Used Storage Space of Time Series Data') then Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage
              else 0
            end as "存储空间-时序存储（GB）"
          FROM            instance_bill
		  where (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest') 
and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '%%'and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '%%'and OwnerId like '%%'
          group by
            t,
			InstanceID,
            "存储空间-日志热存储（GB）",
"存储空间-日志低频存储（GB）",
"存储空间-日志归档存储（GB）",
"存储空间-时序存储（GB）"
        )
      group by
        t,
        Region,
        Project
      order by
        t asc
    )
  group by
    Region,
    Project
),
t4 as (
  select
    Region,
    Project,
	"资源包抵扣费用"
  from(
          select
            split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) as Region,
            split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) as Project,
             round(sum(DeductedByResourcePackage * ListPrice), 2) as "资源包抵扣费用"
          FROM            instance_bill
          where (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest') 
and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '%%'and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '%%'and OwnerId like '%%'
          group by
            Region,
            Project
)
      group by
        Region,
        Project,
"资源包抵扣费用"
),t5 as (
  select
    Region,
    Project,
    concat(BillingItem, ' (', Unit, ')') BillingItem,
    Usage
  from(
      select
        split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) as Region,
        split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) as Project,
        BillingItem,
        arbitrary(UsageUnit) as Unit,
        sum(Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage) as Usage
      FROM        instance_bill
      where
		(productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest') 
        and BillingItem not like '%存储空间%'
        and BillingItem not like '%Storage%'
and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '%%'and OwnerId like '%%'
      group by
        Project,
        Region,
        UsageUnit,
        BillingItem
    )
)
select
  t1.Region as Region,
  t1.Project as Project,
  t5.BillingItem as BillingItem,
  t5.Usage as Usage,
  t2."费用" as "费用 (元)",
  t2."同比上月" as "同比上月 (%)",
  t3."存储空间-日志热存储（GB）" as "存储空间-日志热存储（GB）",
t3."存储空间-日志低频存储（GB）" as "存储空间-日志低频存储（GB）",
t3."存储空间-日志归档存储（GB）" as "存储空间-日志归档存储（GB）",
t3."存储空间-时序存储（GB）" as "存储空间-时序存储（GB）",
  t4."资源包抵扣费用" as "资源包抵扣费用"
FROM  t1
  left join t2 on t1.Project = t2.Project and t1.Region = t2.Region
  left join t3 on t1.Project = t3.Project and t1.Region = t3.Region
  left join t4 on t1.Project = t4.Project and t1.Region = t4.Region  
  left join t5 on t1.Project = t5.Project and t1.Region = t5.Region
order by
 "费用 (元)" desc
limit
  150

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | select DISTINCT split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) from instance_bill where (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest') and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) is not null and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '${{Region|%%}}' and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}' limit 10000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | select DISTINCT split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) from instance_bill where (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest') and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) is not null and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '${{Project|%%}}' and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}' limit 10000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | select DISTINCT split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) from instance_bill where (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest') and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) is not null and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}'

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | select DISTINCT OwnerId from instance_bill where (productcode = 'sls' or productcode = 'slsingest')  limit 10000
